name: archive-cli
description: Organise, archive, and clean up files according to rules you define. Safe by default — moves files rather than deleting them.
author: ScripTron Community

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: archive | organise | cleanup | restore | zip

args_schema.name: rules
args_schema.description: Path to JSON rules file that defines organise/cleanup behaviour

args_schema.name: older-than
args_schema.description: Only affect files older than N days (for cleanup)
